ddls:
CREATE TABLE "cookies" (
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cookie */,
  "cookie_name" TEXT /* Name of the cookie */,
  "provider" TEXT /* Provider of the cookie */,
  "purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the cookie */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the cookie (e.g., First party, Third party) */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the cookie (e.g., Session, 3 months) */,
  "samesite" TEXT /* SameSite attribute of the cookie (e.g., Strict, Lax, None) */,
  "secure" INTEGER /* Secure attribute of the cookie */,
  "httponly" INTEGER /* HttpOnly attribute of the cookie */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cookie was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the cookie was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cookie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookies_type FOREIGN KEY ("type") REFERENCES cookie_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookies_duration FOREIGN KEY ("duration") REFERENCES cookie_durations ("duration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_consents" (
  "consent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consent record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving consent */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie for which consent is given */,
  "consent_status" TEXT /* Status of the consent (e.g., accepted, declined) */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the consent was given */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie category */,
  "granular_consent" INTEGER /* Whether the user has given granular consent for the cookie */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_consents_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES cookie_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_consents_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_consents_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_type" TEXT /* Type of the category (e.g., necessary, functional, performance, marketing) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type (e.g., First party, Third party) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_durations" (
  "duration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each duration */,
  "duration_name" TEXT /* Name of the duration (e.g., Session, 3 months) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the duration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("duration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, developer, end-user) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., administrator, developer, end-user) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_group_members" (
  "group_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each group member */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_group_members_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES cookie_groups ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_group_members_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_policies" (
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each policy */,
  "policy_name" TEXT /* Name of the policy */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the policy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the policy was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the policy was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_policy_consents" (
  "consent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consent record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user giving consent */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy for which consent is given */,
  "consent_status" TEXT /* Status of the consent (e.g., accepted, declined) */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the consent was given */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_policy_consents_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_policy_consents_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES cookie_policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_audit_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie involved in the action */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., set, remove, update) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_audit_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_audit_logs_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_policy_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "policy_id" INTEGER /* ID of the policy */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the policy */,
  "version_details" TEXT /* Details of the policy version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_policy_versions_policy_id FOREIGN KEY ("policy_id") REFERENCES cookie_policies ("policy_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_group_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the group */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the group */,
  "version_details" TEXT /* Details of the group version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_group_versions_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("group_id") REFERENCES cookie_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_exemptions" (
  "exemption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each exemption */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie exempted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user granting the exemption */,
  "exemption_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the exemption */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("exemption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_exemptions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_exemptions_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cookie_vulnerabilities" (
  "vulnerability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vulnerability */,
  "cookie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cookie with the vulnerability */,
  "vulnerability_type" TEXT /* Type of vulnerability (e.g., XSS, CSRF) */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the vulnerability (e.g., critical, high, medium, low) */,
  "mitigation" TEXT /* Mitigation steps for the vulnerability */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vulnerability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cookie_vulnerabilities_cookie_id FOREIGN KEY ("cookie_id") REFERENCES cookies ("cookie_id")
)
